description: Due to new construction nearby, the primary evacuation route has changed. The safety manager must update the project's Emergency Action Plan (EAP).

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the current Emergency Action Plan document.
Update the evacuation map in the EAP to show the new primary route and muster point.

expected_outcome.value: The map is updated with the correct information.

nodes.task_description: Distribute the revised EAP to all site personnel and post the new maps.

expected_outcome.value: The updated plan is communicated to everyone on site.
